reference: FOR THUS SAITH THE LORD UNTO THE HOUSE OF ISRAEL SEEK YE ME AND YE SHALL LIVE HAVE YE OFFERED UNTO ME SACRIFICES AND OFFERINGS IN THE WILDERNESS FORTY YEARS O HOUSE OF ISRAEL
text: For thus saith the Lord unto the house of Israel: Seek ye me, and ye shall live. Have ye offered unto me sacrifices and offerings in the wilderness forty years, O house of Israel?
